## ABSTRACT
## Keywords

FeCoCrNi, a high-entropy alloy fabricated by laser powder bed fusion, has excellent room-temperature me-
Laser powder bed fusion
High-entropy alloy
in this study, we added Mo to form σ precipitates, which improved the high-temperature mechanical properties
High-temperature mechanical properties
of the alloy via Orowan strengthening. We also elucidated the main deformation mechanism of FeCoCrNiMo0.5,
Strengthening mechanism
involving the transformation of the deformational mode from dislocation-based motion to twinning deformation.
